# Research - 2026-06-21

Focus: **all** (CLI, providers, tools, MCP, commands, hooks, skills, plugins, agents, permissions)

> 1-day delta on 2026-06-20. Three NEW items. opencode #33142 shows
> the empty-text-on-cap bug at `agenticChat.ts:514`. opencode #33030
> backfills Bedrock `top_k` - we plumb `top_p` at
> `sapOrchestration.ts:611` but no `top_k`. opencode #32446 carves
> GLM-5.2 from a blanket exclusion - same gap looms in
> `deepseek.ts:44`. kilocode #11478 daemon stop, `b3abf09f` headless
> browser, cline #11685/#11686 Z.ai alias plumbing are all N/A.
> aider 30-day silence + claude-code changelog-only confirm #772.

## Executive Summary

- **opencode #33142 -> Item #1 (~3h)**: When `maxIterations` is hit
  mid tool turn, `finalText` stays `''` (assigned only at line 714
  no-tool branch). User receives silent empty response. opencode
  forces the final allowed turn text-only.
- **opencode #33030 -> Item #2 (~2h)**: `top_k` missing across SAP
  orchestration. Anthropic Claude (default) honors it. Mirror the
  existing `topP` branch.
- **opencode #32446 -> Item #3 (~2h)**: Pre-emptive carve-out for
  `reasoning_effort`. Today only DeepSeek hits the code; once #813
  multi-model lands, a GLM-style blanket gate drops High/Max
  variants on new models silently.
- **N/A**: kilocode #11478 daemon stop, `b3abf09f` headless browser
  (no `kilo console`); cline #11685/#11686 Z.ai/OpenRouter alias
  normalization; opencode #33176/#33158/#33097 opentui-only fixes.
- **Carryover**: #812 and #810 STILL unlabeled `auto-implement`
  after 3 days. Same blocker as 06-19, 06-20.

## Detailed Findings

#### 1. Force final-turn text-only when maxIterations cap hit (Category: core, ~3h)

- **What**: At `agenticChat.ts:516`, when
  `iterations === maxIterations - 1`, drop `tools` from
  `provider.complete()` for that one call and inject
  `<system-reminder>Step limit reached. Summarize and return a final
  answer; no tool calls will be honored.</...>`. If the model still
  emits tool_calls, ignore them and set `finalText = result.text ||
  '[Max iterations reached]'` before break. Mirror in
  `streamingOrchestrator.ts`. Reuse `agenticChat.test.ts:425`
  `maxIterations: 3` to assert non-empty text.
- **Why**: Loop exits with `text: ''` from line 514 when cap hits
  on a tool-using turn (`finalText` only assigned in no-tool branch
  at line 714). CLI users see a silent empty response; `goal.ts`
  and `agent.ts` treat empty as success. opencode session-runner
  had the same bug at 25 steps.
- **Source**: sst/opencode#33142 (commit `4f1a9d7a`, 2026-06-20,
  `+76 -83`, session-runner.ts).
- **Category**: core. **Size**: small (~3h).

#### 2. Plumb top_k through SAP orchestration provider (Category: provider, ~2h)

- **What**: Add `topK?: number` to `OrchestrationConfig` (~L269),
  `CompletionOptions` (~L304), ProviderConfig. In
  `sapOrchestration.ts:611-613` mirror the `topP` branch:
  `if (options?.topK !== undefined || this.config.topK !== undefined)
  { modelParams.top_k = options?.topK ?? this.config.topK; }`.
  Document in `docs/PROVIDERS.md`: honored on Anthropic Claude,
  silently dropped on OpenAI-family deployments. Unit test asserts
  the field reaches `modelParams.top_k`.
- **Why**: We expose `top_p`, `temperature`, `frequency_penalty`,
  `presence_penalty` but skip `top_k`. Default model is
  `sap-ai-core/anthropic--claude-4.7-opus`; Anthropic supports it.
  opencode found the same gap in Bedrock Converse and routed via
  `additionalModelRequestFields.top_k`.
- **Source**: sst/opencode#33030 (commit `2d993cd0`, 2026-06-20,
  `+23 -0`, bedrock-converse.ts).
- **Category**: provider. **Size**: small (~2h).

#### 3. Per-model carve-out for reasoning_effort blanket gates (Category: provider, ~2h)

- **What**: Refactor `deepseek.ts:44` from unconditional
  `request.reasoning_effort = options.reasoningEffort` to a
  `modelSupportsReasoningEffort(id): 'none' | 'binary' | 'levels'`
  helper in `model-match.ts`. `'levels'` -> send as-is; `'binary'`
  -> send `enable_thinking: true`; `'none'` -> drop. Fixture per
  branch.
- **Why**: Pre-emptive. Today DeepSeek is the only caller, but #813
  multi-model and routing-config let users name arbitrary
  reasoning deployments. opencode hit this with GLM-4/4.x/5/5.1 vs
  5.2: `id.includes('glm')` returned `{}` and killed High/Max
  variants when 5.2 arrived. One file + tests now beats three files
  + deprecation after a regression report.
- **Source**: sst/opencode#32446 (commit `22cc758b`, 2026-06-20,
  `+119 -1`, provider/transform.ts).
- **Category**: provider. **Size**: small (~2h).

## Actionable Recommendations

1. **Ladder by user-visible impact**: ship #1 first - silent empty
   response is a correctness bug. Then #2 (one-field, zero risk).
   #3 last as hygiene ahead of #813.
2. **Queue blocker 3 days old**: #812, #810, #804 still zero
   `auto-implement`. Run `gh issue edit 812 810 804 --add-label
   auto-implement` from the next planning run, or land #773.
3. **Polling cadence**: aider 30-day silence, claude-code 100%
   changelog noise. Land #772 weekly demotion - ~40% `gh api`
   budget cut, no signal loss.
